diary_entries.entry: The dust_storm changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
The dust_storm changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Another year. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 50): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
